subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-12-01
subcodes.first_line: A Manifestation of God is first proven by the characteristics of the Divine Essence shining forth from Him... the Bab and the Blessed Perfection said before the appearance of the first Adam, an hundred thousand Adams appeared upon the earth, but in these days the people only know of the Adam who came 5,000 years ago.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @names and attributes of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
